title: Upload Products
description: Add products one by one, or bulk-upload a spreadsheet, into your catalogue.

steps.title: Category and subcategory
steps.description: The category decides the required spec fields.
steps.voiceScript: Pick the category and subcategory. They set the required spec fields.
steps.captionText: Pick the category and subcategory. They set the required spec fields.
steps.fallbackMessage: Category and subcategory: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Product details
steps.description: Name, price, unit and specs make a complete listing.
steps.voiceScript: Enter the product name, price, unit and specs for a complete listing.
steps.captionText: Enter the product name, price, unit and specs for a complete listing.
steps.fallbackMessage: Product details: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Publish to the catalogue
steps.voiceScript: Publish. The product enters buyer searches and RFQs.
steps.captionText: Publish. The product enters buyer searches and RFQs.
steps.fallbackMessage: Publish to the catalogue: not visible on this screen yet.
